testcase.name: test_secret_scan
testcase.failure:
tmp_path = WindowsPath('C:/Users/wen/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-wen/pytest-141/test_secret_scan0')
def test_secret_scan(tmp_path): patterns_file = tmp_path / "patterns.json" patterns_file.write_text(json.dumps([ {"name": "Fake Key", "pattern": "key-[a-z]{5}", "severity": "HIGH"} ]))
scanner = SecretScanner(str(patterns_file)) content = "This is a key-abcde and another key-12345" findings = scanner.scan_file("test.txt", content)
assert len(findings) == 1 assert findings[0]['pattern_name'] == "Fake Key" > assert findings[0]['value_preview'] == "****" E AssertionError: assert 'key-*bcde' == '****' E E #x1B[0m#x1B[91m- ****#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m E #x1B[92m+ key-*bcde#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m
tests\test_secrets.py:17: AssertionError
